Home/Choose a palm with confidence.

Authentic Khairpur stock

Choose a palm with confidence.

A date palm is a long-term asset, not a quick garden purchase — a well-chosen, well-planted palm can be part of a property for decades. We help buyers compare purpose, variety, height, logistics and installation requirements before selecting stock, so the decision is based on the actual site and goal rather than a single photo. Whether the plan is one statement tree for a home entrance or a full commercial orchard, the right starting point is the same: clear requirements, verified current stock, and a supplier based in the growing region itself.

Check palm availability →
AseelAvailable from approximately 1–20 ft
QarbalaAvailable from approximately 1–10 ft
ServiceSupply and installation
OriginKhairpur Mirs, Sindh

What buyers need to know

01

Aseel Date Palm

Khairpur’s best-known commercial date variety and a strong choice for orchard, farmhouse and landscape enquiries. Available from approximately 1 ft to 20 ft, so the same variety can serve a young starter planting or a tall, immediate-impact specimen. Availability changes by height and season, and is confirmed directly before quotation.

  • Multiple height bands
  • Farm and farmhouse use
  • Installation enquiry available
02

Qarbala Date Palm

A regional date-palm option available in several young-to-established sizes, from approximately 1 ft to 10 ft. Qarbala is a good fit for buyers who want a mix of varieties within one planting, or who specifically want this locally recognised type. Exact stock and specification are confirmed before quotation.

  • Approximately 1–10 ft
  • Garden and farm enquiries
  • Direct nursery confirmation
03

Mature and Big Root Palms

Larger, established palms — including big-root specimens up to around 18 ft — require careful access assessment, lifting equipment, transportation planning and a prepared planting site. These are quoted as individual projects after reviewing site photographs, access and quantity, rather than from height alone.

  • Site-access review
  • Handling and delivery planning
  • Professional installation

Indicative pricing

Typical price guide.
Confirmed at enquiry.

Prices vary with current nursery stock, quantity and delivery destination. Use this as a starting guide, then confirm the final quotation on WhatsApp.

PlantSizePrice
Nursery Plant1.5–2 ftPKR 2,000
Date Palm5–6 ftPKR 5,000
Date Palm8–10 ftPKR 6,000
Date Palm10–12 ftPKR 6,500
Date Palm12–14 ftPKR 7,000
Date Palm14–16 ftPKR 7,500
Big Root Date Palm5–18 ftPKR 10,000–12,000
